title: Notre-Dame spire (la flèche) — Definition of Done (machine-gradable)
note: The single source of 'done'. scripts/orchestrate.mjs grades each criterion from real artifacts after the VERIFY phase and writes the verdicts into artifacts/run-summary.json; it REFUSES to enter SHIP unless every required criterion is green. Any critical:true failure halts the run. An item is green only when its check is satisfied by a real artifact — never self-asserted. The same file, with `building` swapped, grades any other building (rerunnable).

grading.rule: DONE = every criterion with required:true is green. Any critical:true failure is a hard stop (do not ship, do not continue).
grading.evidence_file: artifacts/run-summary.json (per-criterion verdict, the measured value/evidence, durations, overall pass/fail)
grading.principle: Done is decided by the verifier, not a human. Nothing renders without a real, cited source; measured reality is never corrected toward the rulebook.

impact.what: a real heritage tool that makes fidelity affordable; the building the world watched burn (2019) and reopen (2024); auditable provenance

demo.what: drawing→3D reveal → provenance toggle → live demo:corrupt refusal → the live spire; the recorded run captures it

autonomy.what: the verifier gate + vision sub-agent catch failures without a human; failed reports kept as proof

orchestration.what: npm run goal runs the whole flow green + responding URL + this rubric; rerunnable across buildings (Nanchan stays green)

criteria.requirement: npm run goal runs the full 8-phase flow (research→ingest→derive→build→verify→loop→record→ship) and exits 0
npm run build (= research && derive && verify && next build) exits 0
Research Phase 0 emits the canonical + findings as one deterministic pipe
criteria.check: artifacts/research-findings.json has 16 verdicts + 40 gaps AND data/notre-dame-canonical.json present; byte-stable across two replay runs

criteria.requirement: Every dimension carries {provenance, source, url, rights}
Zero unsourced components — G09 source-registry passes (a source must resolve to the rights-cleared registry, not merely be non-empty)
No fabrication: no measured/reconstructed_design node cites a non-registry source; GAP fields left unfilled (no invented numbers)
criteria.check: every source cross-refs the rights table; GAP-marked fields contain no value

criteria.requirement: No restricted assets ingested (Tallon/AGP/CNRS/blog = cite-only)
Deterministic verifier (V-checks recomputed from component coords, never spec.key_dimensions, + pixel checks) passes
criteria.check: verifier-report exit 0; V08–V14 + P01–P03 all pass

criteria.requirement: Vision-verifier sub-agent passes in a fresh context
Measured-reality guard (V08 for the spire; the V09-analog from Nanchan): demo:corrupt → verify refuses (exit 1) → demo:restore → green. The build cannot ship geometry idealized toward the rulebook
criteria.check: orchestrate LOOP recorded a corrupt→refuse(exit 1)→restore→green beat

criteria.requirement: ≥1 logged fail→revise→pass cycle; failed reports kept
criteria.check: ≥1 artifacts/verifier-report.*.failed.json present alongside the passing report

criteria.requirement: Derive emits structural-spec + derivation-log; the comp() unsourced-component audit threw nothing
All geometry is procedural — no imported meshes
criteria.check: no .glb/.gltf/.obj/.fbx import in components/ or the scene module

criteria.requirement: Provenance toggle works (colour by evidence class)
criteria.check: P03 shows all four evidence-class colours

criteria.requirement: Click-to-inspect shows FR/EN name + role + citation
criteria.check: SpireViewer Inspector present + components carry name_fr/en, role, source, url, rights

criteria.requirement: Construction-sequence animation plays (real-time Build Theater)
Drawing → 3D reveal works
A recorded artifacts/run-*.webm exists
Live URL responds 200
Public repo (hackathon rule — private = DQ)
README with pitch, problem, method, source/rights table, why Fable 5, rerun instructions
criteria.check: README.md present with those sections + the rights table

criteria.requirement: Session log shows long autonomous stretches; human interventions are new-information only (not course-corrections)
criteria.check: review the session log; interventions limited to credentials/new info

criteria.requirement: Rerunnable: npm run goal works from a clean checkout and is building-parameterized; Nanchan stays green as the regression anchor
criteria.check: fresh clone + npm run goal reaches green; --building nanchan still passes

criteria.requirement: PASS 1 massing: cathedral total length 128 m (extreme X span of cathedral components) ±2%
PASS 1 massing: max width across transept 48 m (Z span) ±2% + transept arm thickness 14 m
PASS 1 massing: west façade width 43.5 m ±2% + façade body height ≈45 m
PASS 1 massing: west towers reach 69 m ±2%
PASS 1 massing: nave high-vault crown 33 m (measured-reality guard: not 35 m, not 43 m)
Spire group composes UNCHANGED on the crossing (x≈0,z≈0): total 96 m, base 30 m, 8 faces, 16 statues; V08–V14 stay green
criteria.check: verifier C06 passes (and V08–V14 still pass)

criteria.requirement: Every massing block {provenance,source,url,rights}; 0 unsourced; all four evidence classes; massing renders measured/rule_derived, the spire full fidelity (honesty gradient)

whole-cathedral.note: PASS 1 whole-cathedral massing, composed into the same structural-spec.notre-dame.json behind the building selector. required:false so the spire (V08–V14 / P01–P03) verdict is unaffected — partial fidelity is honest, the provenance toggle shows the gradient. Each C-check is recomputed FROM COMPONENT COORDINATES, never from spec.key_dimensions.

checks.C01: total length 128 m — extreme X span of cathedral components ±2%
checks.C02: max width across transept 48 m — Z span ±2% + arm thickness 14 m
checks.C03: west façade width 43.5 m ±2% + façade body ≈45 m
checks.C05: nave vault crown 33 m (guard: not 35 m / not 43 m)
checks.C06: spire composes unchanged on the crossing (x≈0,z≈0); V08–V14 intact; 8 faces, 16 statues
checks.C-PROV: massing provenance audit (every block sourced; all four classes; fidelity gradient massing/full)
